final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing marketing poster for OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone product launch.

Style/medium: brand exposure poster, commercial advertising with bold visual impact, clean tech aesthetic
Composition: full-screen 9:16 vertical format, centered product hero shot with ample breathing room
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone, sleek modern design, prominent branding
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or abstract tech-inspired background, keeping focus on product
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with highlights on device edges, premium and aspirational mood
Color palette: OPPO brand colors (likely green/blue gradients) as base, metallic silver accents on device, high contrast for impact
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Ultra"
Constraints: must work as 1080×1920 full-screen display; brand visibility prioritized; visual impact over information density
Avoid: cluttered layouts, generic stock photography, watermarks, text overcrowding, 8K stuffer aesthetic
